reference: I have developed a cough after I get hot. I start sweating and begin coughing. My lungs also feel inflamed and I begin wheezing when I inhale and exhale. It normally lasts until I take some cough medicine and go to sleep. It has only occurred within the last week after I exercise or cut the grass, and it is around eighty-five to ninety degrees Fahrenheit outside. Any thoughts?
text: I have developed a cough after I get hot. I start sweating and coughing. My lungs also feel inflamed and I inhale and exhale. It normally lasts until I take some cough medicine. It has only occurred in the last week after I exercised on the grass and it was around 85-90 degrees Fahrenheit outside.
